title: Aramine AutoNav makes mining safer at Reward Gold Mine
description:
RCT, with Epiroc’s AutoNav Tele, is enhancing narrow-vein mining at the Reward Gold Mine in Australia.

The post Aramine AutoNav makes mining safer at Reward Gold Mine appeared first on The Robot Report.
